channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Signs twisted, 24th March
item.description:
Signs on street light O21 6 Both sign plates are twisted

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin keeps getting moved, blocks pavement, 24th March
item.description:
Since the restaurant opened on the corner of Garden Walk and Great Eastern Street, this bin keeps getting moved back onto the thinner part of the pavement. Pavement is completely inaccessible now, residents and businesses leave their rubbish around the bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garden Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain full solid - flooding when rains, 24th March
item.description:
This drain is full solid. Leads to flooding when it rains. Been like this for years so presume connections need jetting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Behind bus stop, 24th March
item.description:
Dead fox since yesterday morning

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath

item.title: Fly tipping of household furniture, 24th March
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lamport Close, Woolwich

item.title: Graffitti, 24th March
item.description:
Red Graffiti on Electrical Box.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherman Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Marked parking bays ...., 24th March
item.description:
I recently reported via Fix My Street, that designated marked out pavement parking boxes in Highbanks Close DA16 3ES , have over many years, almost completely worn away. I received a ticket for parking on the pavement, whilst parked in a designated box outside No5. Luckily I caught the parking attendant and pointed out the almost non existent markings and he removed and canceled the ticket ... I today notice that the boxes at the start of the Highbanks have be remarked but the rest of the road where residents park from No1 to No68 and where parking tickets are regularly being issued, have been left untouched. There is also no visable signage regarding parking and people remain uncertain as to exactly where or how to park. Parking in the kerb, which is permitted, results in access restrictions for larger vehicles such as fire engines and dustcarts. Could someone please look into this matter again and get the boxes remarked so that parking tickets are not incorrectly issued in the future. Some clear signage would also avoid confusion for non residents who park here when walking there dogs in East Wickham Open Space.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highbanks Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stones and dry concrete mix on both side of side of the road., 24th March
item.description:
Stones and dry concrete mix on both side of side of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knee Hill, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: 15 Minster and fordwych Road, 24th March
item.description:
Previous repairs failed. Pavement lifting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Minster Road, Kilburn, Greater London

item.title: Furniture abandoned on the street, 24th March
item.description:
There has been a shelving unit and mattress abandoned on Fernholme Road outside number 6. This is causing a bottle neck on the pavement restricting access for wheelchairs and mobility aid users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fernholme Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Height of tree, 24th March
item.description:
The tree outside of our property has been due to be pruned twice in the last couple of years. In spite of notices being put on the tree “do not park tree cutting and date” cars have still parked not allowing the work to be done Can you please look into this
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significantly damaged public street sign 'Southend Road', 24th March
item.description:
A large Superdrug HGV lorry made a dangerous u-turn at the mini roundabout connecting Southend Road and Brackley Road - the rear of the vehicle struck the boundary and caused notable damage, including breaking part of the brick podium, removing the number “30” property sign and significantly damaging the Southend Road public street sign. Incident occurred at 6:30pm on Monday 23rd March.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads or debris and rubbish. Also high street estate agent signed dumped, 24th March
item.description:
Loads of rubbish and litter around. This is on Madeleine road and Versailles road. Also outside scholars court an estate agent sign has been dumped.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Worcester Close, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
